overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk city interior, starting in a neon-lit lounge overlooking Night City, moving through an abandoned arcade, and continuing along elevated corridors with panoramic views of holographic billboards and skyscrapers. The footage is from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring high-end real-time rendering with ray-traced neon lighting and reflective surfaces.

events.description: turning away from window to face interior corridor

agents.ego_description: standing in neon-lit lounge looking out at Night City skyline through floor-to-ceiling windows, then turning to proceed deeper into the building

digital advertising screen displaying various commercials
transparent safety barrier with metallic supports
modern seating with purple LED underlighting

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a futuristic observation lounge with purple neon ambient lighting. Large glass windows dominate the far wall, offering a view of Night City's illuminated skyline. A digital billboard screen hangs in the center of the room. The space is deserted, with only the glow of city lights and neon fixtures visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned arcade and bar with gaming machines

events.description: entering interior arcade space from observation lounge
turning right to navigate between rows of slot machines

agents.ego_description: walking through deserted neon-lit arcade, passing rows of slot machines and illuminated bar counters

entered.detail: rows of gambling machines with flashing lights and digital displays
long service counter with vibrant purple neon underlighting
industrial ceiling with visible ductwork and structural beams
braindance and gaming machines with glowing screens

segments.scene_description: Moving from the lounge into a dimly lit arcade interior, the environment shifts to enclosed space with no natural light. Purple and cyan neon illuminates rows of slot machines and bar counters. The floor is polished concrete, and industrial ceiling beams are visible overhead. The area is completely empty of people.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian corridor with graffiti and city views

events.description: exiting arcade into covered walkway with side windows overlooking city
pedestrians appear walking in the corridor ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through covered corridor, passing other pedestrians and observing Night City through side windows

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking toward the camera
person leaning against window railing looking out at the city view

entered.detail: long horizontal windows offering views of Night City skyline
concrete wall with colorful graffiti tags including 'TYGER CLAW'
illuminated automated vendor with glowing display
safety barrier along the window wall

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a covered pedestrian corridor with windows on one side revealing the city outside. The walls feature urban graffiti, and a few pedestrians walk through the space. The lighting is dimmer here, mixing interior illumination with the glow of city lights through the windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway with panoramic holographic billboard views

events.description: corridor opens to wider panoramic view with large holographic advertisements visible
slowing to observe the holographic billboards and cityscape

agents.ego_description: walking along elevated corridor, pausing to view massive holographic advertisements and the Night City skyline

notable_agents.action: pedestrian leaning on railing taking in the city view

entered.detail: massive floating green holographic advertisement above the buildings
futuristic overpass with bright pink neon lighting
dense cluster of illuminated skyscrapers and high-rise buildings

segments.scene_description: The corridor continues with expansive views of Night City's skyline. Massive holographic billboards float above the buildings, and a neon-lit bridge structure is visible to the right. Several pedestrians stand by the windows observing the view, while traffic moves on the streets far below. The atmosphere is distinctly cyberpunk with overwhelming neon and futuristic architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded neon lounge into the bustling, high-tech corridors of a cyberpunk metropolis. It begins in a deserted observation lounge bathed in purple ambient light, where large glass windows reveal the illuminated skyline of Night City. As the camera moves forward, the open view vanishes and the environment shifts into a dimly lit, enclosed arcade filled with rows of cyan and purple slot machines on polished concrete floors. The scene then opens into a covered pedestrian corridor where urban graffiti lines the walls and the first signs of city life appear through side windows. Finally, the space expands into a wide walkway featuring massive floating holographic billboards and a neon-lit bridge, with pedestrians observing the overwhelming scale of the futuristic architecture and traffic far below.
